news.title:
JPMorgan Chase rates Max Financial Services Overweight with Rs 2,170 target, citing GST exemption boosting retail protection demand.
Margin recovery, industry reforms, and larger insurers gaining market share drive optimism in life insurance sector.
news.summary:
JPMorgan Chase rates Max Financial Services Overweight with Rs 2,170 target, citing GST exemption boosting retail protection demand.
Margin recovery, industry reforms, and larger insurers gaining market share drive optimism in life insurance sector.

news.title:
Max Financial Services Ltd's board to meet on Mar 12, 2026, to consider raising capital for Axis Max Life Insurance.
Trading window closed for designated persons from Mar 7-14, 2026; details available on company's website.
news.summary:
Max Financial Services Ltd's board to meet on Mar 12, 2026, to consider raising capital for Axis Max Life Insurance.
Trading window closed for designated persons from Mar 7-14, 2026; details available on company's website.

news.title:
Max Financial plans merger with Axis Max Life to list AMLI by April 2027.
MFSL shares fell 2.3% to ₹1706.9 today, offering ~2% YTD return.
news.summary:
Max Financial plans merger with Axis Max Life to list AMLI by April 2027.
MFSL shares fell 2.3% to ₹1706.9 today, offering ~2% YTD return.

news.title:
Max Financial Services plans merger with Axis Max Life for public listing.
Initial approval from Axis Bank entities depends on IRDAI permissions.
news.summary:
Max Financial Services plans merger with Axis Max Life for public listing.
Initial approval from Axis Bank entities depends on IRDAI permissions.

news.title:
Max Financial's Axis Max Life reported 20% growth in individual premiums for 9M FY26.
Q3 retail APE rose 30%, PAT stood at INR 137 cr, solvency ratio at 201%.
news.summary:
Max Financial's Axis Max Life reported 20% growth in individual premiums for 9M FY26.
Q3 retail APE rose 30%, PAT stood at INR 137 cr, solvency ratio at 201%.

news.title:
Max Financial aims for 300-500 bps growth above market average.
The company focuses on sustaining a 25% margin stability.
news.summary:
Max Financial aims for 300-500 bps growth above market average.
The company focuses on sustaining a 25% margin stability.

news.title:
Max Financial projects FY26 VNB margins at 24%-25% due to strong sales.
Management anticipates continued sales growth, possibly boosting initial forecasts.
news.summary:
Max Financial projects FY26 VNB margins at 24%-25% due to strong sales.
Management anticipates continued sales growth, possibly boosting initial forecasts.

news.title: Citi upgrades Max Financial Services, raising target price to 2,675.
news.summary: Citi upgrades Max Financial Services, raising target price to 2,675.

news.title:
Max Financial Services notes RBI regulations on mis-selling may affect short-term growth.
Banks might adopt cautious approaches under the new guidelines.
news.summary:
Max Financial Services notes RBI regulations on mis-selling may affect short-term growth.
Banks might adopt cautious approaches under the new guidelines.

news.title:
Max Financial Q3 net profit fell to 366M vs 560M YoY, below est. 1.23B.
Q3 revenue surged to 142.6B, up from 89B YoY, showing strong growth.
news.summary:
Max Financial Q3 net profit fell to 366M vs 560M YoY, below est. 1.23B.
Q3 revenue surged to 142.6B, up from 89B YoY, showing strong growth.

news.title:
Max Financial's consolidated revenue grew 18% YoY, excluding investment income.
Individual premiums rose 20%, VNB grew 30%, and market share hit 9.8%.
news.summary:
Max Financial's consolidated revenue grew 18% YoY, excluding investment income.
Individual premiums rose 20%, VNB grew 30%, and market share hit 9.8%.

news.title:
Max Financial's 9M FY26 revenue grew 18% to Rs 24,625 cr, AUM reached Rs 1.93 lakh cr.
VNB rose 30% to Rs 1,633 cr, NBM improved to 23.6%, solvency ratio at 201%.
news.summary:
Max Financial's 9M FY26 revenue grew 18% to Rs 24,625 cr, AUM reached Rs 1.93 lakh cr.
VNB rose 30% to Rs 1,633 cr, NBM improved to 23.6%, solvency ratio at 201%.

news.title:
Max Financial Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025, with revenue of Rs. 14,258.9 Cr.
Profit after tax for Q3 stood at Rs. 44.8 Cr, driven by life insurance operations; board approved financials and limited review report.
news.summary:
Max Financial Services reported unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9M ending Dec 31, 2025, with revenue of Rs. 14,258.9 Cr.
Profit after tax for Q3 stood at Rs. 44.8 Cr, driven by life insurance operations; board approved financials and limited review report.

news.title:
Max Financial Services hit an all-time high of Rs.1780, showcasing strong performance.
The milestone reflects sustained investor confidence and operational strength in a competitive industry.
news.summary:
Max Financial Services hit an all-time high of Rs.1780, showcasing strong performance.
The milestone reflects sustained investor confidence and operational strength in a competitive industry.

news.title:
Max Financial gets approval for potential merger with Axis Max Life.
This move signals significant consolidation in the insurance sector.
news.summary:
Max Financial gets approval for potential merger with Axis Max Life.

news.title:
Max Financial's board approves in-principle merger with subsidiary AMLI.
Shareholders to receive AMLI shares; merger awaits regulatory and Axis Bank approvals.
news.summary:

news.title:
Max Financial executed an NSE block trade of ~207,569 shares at Rs. 1610.9.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 33.44 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Institutional investors hold 63% of Max Financial Services, with the top 8 shareholders owning 51%.
The stock saw a 3.2% dip last week but delivered a 54% one-year return.
news.summary:
Institutional investors hold 63% of Max Financial Services, with the top 8 shareholders owning 51%.

news.title:
Insurance Amendment Bill may allow 100% FDI, impacting health insurers negatively by increasing competition.
Max Financial benefits from easier merger with Max Life; LIC, SBI Life face challenges due to agent-related clauses.
news.summary:
Insurance Amendment Bill may allow 100% FDI, impacting health insurers negatively by increasing competition.
Max Financial benefits from easier merger with Max Life; LIC, SBI Life face challenges due to agent-related clauses.

news.title:
Insurance Amendment Bill may allow mergers, composite licenses, 100% FDI, and ease entry norms for insurers.
IRDAI powers enhanced; share transfer limit raised to 5%, retirement age extended to 65 years.
news.summary:
Insurance Amendment Bill may allow mergers, composite licenses, 100% FDI, and ease entry norms for insurers.
IRDAI powers enhanced; share transfer limit raised to 5%, retirement age extended to 65 years.
